path: Problem: Extract only the time portion from a date-time value while keeping it as a numeric time that can be formatted (e.g., hh:mm:ss AM/PM)
Action: Subtract the integer date part using INT to leave the fractional time component

Observation: Excel stores date-times as serial numbers where the integer part is the date and the fractional part is the time; text extraction (e.g., RIGHT) returns a string that won't respond to time formatting
